# EnglishVidya — AI Agent Quick Reference
# Website: https://englishvidya.com
# Purpose: This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude) understand EnglishVidya in under 300 tokens.

## About
EnglishVidya (englishvidya.com) is a free, bilingual (Hindi + English) educational platform for Hindi-medium students in Bihar and UP (India). Target audience: Class 6–12 students and competitive exam aspirants (SSC, Bank, Railway). Founded by Master Manikant.

## Content Sections
- /grammar/ — Universal English Grammar from zero level. Bilingual articles: English definition → Devanagari pronunciation → Hindi explanation.
- /dictionary/ — Individual word pages (/dictionary/[word]/) with meaning, pronunciation, examples, synonyms, antonyms.
- /flashcards/ — Vocabulary revision tool.
- /about-us/ — About EnglishVidya platform and About Master Manikant (founder).

## Content Format (Grammar Articles)
Each article follows a 3-layer structure:
1. English definition
2. Pronunciation in Devanagari script (e.g., "अ वर्ड इज़...")
3. Hindi explanation in simple language

## Tech Stack
- Static Site Generator: Eleventy (11ty) v3
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages (via GitHub auto-deploy)
- Domain: englishvidya.com (since March 2025)
- Social: @englishvidyahq on all platforms

## Live Pages (as of June 2026)
- /grammar/topic-02-language-communication-and-grammar/
- /grammar/topic-03-alphabet-phonics-and-pronunciation/
